## What & why

Describe the change and the motivation. Link any related issue.

## Checklist

- [ ] Everything compiles (`py_compile` over all modules)
- [ ] Relevant module self-tests pass
- [ ] `python test_sicurezza.py` is green
- [ ] Stays local-first (no data leaves the machine; API on `127.0.0.1`)
- [ ] New dependencies are optional and justified
- [ ] UI changes: ran the impeccable detector, preserved JS selectors & endpoints
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior changed
